## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is present and valid on all new/modified `.md` files
- [ ] File naming follows conventions (`{slug}_v{semver}_{date}.md`)
- [ ] Previous versions archived before overwriting
- [ ] Markdown-first: content authored in Markdown before any binary export
- [ ] No unreplaced `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` variables (unless intentionally deferred)
- [ ] Workspace validation passes (`make validate`)
